name: Monkey Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly coat a 9-inch square baking pan with nonstick cooking spray.
3. In a small bowl, mix together flour and baking powder.
4. In another bowl, beat together mashed bananas, brown sugar, and granulated sugar until blended.
5. Add buttermilk, egg, oil, and vanilla to the banana mixture, beating well.
6. Stir in the flour mixture until just combined.
7. Fold in chopped walnuts.
8. Spread batter evenly into the prepared pan.
9. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Remove from oven and let cool in the pan on a wire rack.
11. In a small cup, stir together confectioner's sugar and water until smooth. Add more water if needed for better drizzling consistency.
12. Drizzle over the cooled cake bars.
13. Cut into 12 pieces.
